name: Linear
description: Manage issues, projects, cycles, and teams in Linear — the modern software project management tool. Create, update, and triage engineering work directly from the agent.

tools_summary.name: linear_get_issues
tools_summary.description: Get issues from Linear with optional filters

tools_summary.name: linear_create_issue
tools_summary.description: Create a new issue in Linear

tools_summary.name: linear_get_teams
tools_summary.description: Get all teams in the Linear workspace

tools_summary.name: linear_get_viewer
tools_summary.description: Get the authenticated user's Linear profile

tools_summary.name: linear_add_comment
tools_summary.description: Add a comment to a Linear issue

setup_instructions: Get your API key from Linear Settings → API → Create new key. Set as LINEAR_API_KEY environment variable.
